evidence.snippet:
America’s Leading Drone
Manufacturer
======================================
We are a drone manufacturer specializing in heavy-lift industrial drones designed for commercial and government applications. We lead the industry in custom payload integration services, and integrate the most advanced UAV sensors in the world.  Harris Aerial is NDAA compliant and proudly Manufactured in the United States of America.
Harris Aerial is a drone manufacturer specializing in custom drones, aerial photography drones, heavy lift drones, agricultural drones, UAS, UAV and multirotor drones.

items.notes: Designs and manufactures complete heavy-lift multirotor UAS platforms (Carrier H6, Carrier Hx8, Carrier H6HL series)

evidence.snippet:
[![Harris Aerial C-GCS](https://harrisaerial.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/GCS_QGC-1024x780.webp)](https://harrisaerial.com/ground-control/c-gcs/)
C-GCS
-----
C-GCS is a revolutionary break-through in safe and easy operation of unmanned aerial vehicles.
[Learn More](/ground-control/c-gcs/)
[![](https://harrisaerial.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/TAB_5_0000_16.09.24_PNG-2048x1152_Overlay-1024x576.webp)](https://harrisaerial.com/ground-control/c-navigator/)
C-Navigator
-----------
C-NAVIGATOR is Harris Aerial’s compact and rugged NDAA compliant handheld Ground Control Station.
[Learn More](/ground-control/c-navigator/)
[![](https://harrisaerial.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/SRoC_overlay-e1739382410912.webp)](https://harrisaerial.com/ground-control-2/c-sroc/)
C-SRoC
------
SRoC is our military-grade IP 65 handheld GCS providing exceptional communication flexibility in hard environments.
[Learn More](https://harrisaerial.com/ground-control-2/c-sroc/)

items.notes: Sells proprietary GCS products: C-GCS, C-NAVIGATOR (NDAA-compliant handheld), and C-SRoC (military-grade handheld)

evidence.snippet:
America’s Leading Drone
Manufacturer
======================================
We are a drone manufacturer specializing in heavy-lift industrial drones designed for commercial and government applications. We lead the industry in custom payload integration services, and integrate the most advanced UAV sensors in the world.  Harris Aerial is NDAA compliant and proudly Manufactured in the United States of America.

Our UAV Manufacturing and engineering process is completely carried out in-house.
We are quickly able to take ideas from concept to finished product, because of our advanced machining capabilities.
High precision CNC milling, CNC routing, and 3D printing is our catalyst behind providing high quality drones tailored to our clients’ specific needs.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures complete UAS platforms in-house in Casselberry, FL; CNC machining and 3D printing done in-house

evidence.snippet:
H6 Electric
-----------
The H6 Electric achieves impressive flight-times using battery power,  it’s focused on adaptability among its payload and power format versatility.
[Learn More](https://harrisaerial.com/carrier-h6-electric/)

items.name: Carrier H6 Hybrid

evidence.snippet:
H6 Hybrid EFI
-------------
The Carrier H6 Hybrid is our flagship heavy-lift gas-electric hybrid drone powered by our
H2400 EFI generator.
[Learn More](https://harrisaerial.com/carrier-drones/carrier-h6-hybrid/)

items.notes: Also referred to as Carrier H6 EFI Hybrid; powered by H2400 EFI generator

evidence.snippet:
H6 Hydrone
----------
The H6 Hydrone is our heavy-lift hybrid electric drone powered by our hydrogen fuel cell.
[Learn More](https://harrisaerial.com/carrier-drones/carrier-h6-hydrone/)

[![industrial drone](https://harrisaerial.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/H8_SH2_v01.webp)](https://harrisaerial.com/carrier-drones/carrier-Hx8/)
Carrier Hx8
-----------
Compact co-axial octocopter with 8kg payload capacity and unmatched motor redunandcy.

items.name: Carrier H6HL
items.product_type: heavy-lift hexacopter UAV (40 kg max payload)

evidence.snippet:

Carrier H6HL
------------
40kg Maximum Payload, our heaviest lifting multirotor to date.

products.notes: Core drone platforms and GCS products confirmed. Payloads section lists third-party sensors (e.g. Sentera 6x, Phoenix Miniranger LiDAR) that Harris Aerial integrates but does not manufacture.

evidence.snippet: We are a drone manufacturer specializing in heavy-lift industrial drones designed for commercial and government applications. We lead the industry in custom payload integration services, and integrate the most advanced UAV sensors in the world.  Harris Aerial is NDAA compliant and proudly Manufactured in the United States of America.
C-NAVIGATOR is Harris Aerial’s compact and rugged NDAA compliant handheld Ground Control Station.

ndaa.notes: Homepage explicitly states NDAA compliant; C-NAVIGATOR product page also described as NDAA compliant

evidence.snippet:
Our UAV Manufacturing and engineering process is completely carried out in-house.
We are quickly able to take ideas from concept to finished product, because of our advanced machining capabilities.
High precision CNC milling, CNC routing, and 3D printing is our catalyst behind providing high quality drones tailored to our clients’ specific needs.

*   **5 kg max payload**
*   **Up to 3 hours flight time** (with 4L fuel) and **max flight time up to 5 hours** (configuration dependent)
*   **2.4kW continuous generator power**, plus accessory power ports (5.3V / 12V / 24V / 48V)

readiness.notes: Named SKUs with detailed specs sold commercially; manufactured in-house with CNC machining

unresolved_questions: Blue UAS / DIU Cleared List status not mentioned anywhere in the corpus

fetch_requests.reason: Carrier Hx8 dedicated product page was skipped; would confirm full specs, payload capacity, and production availability
Carrier H6HL dedicated product page was skipped; would confirm full specs (40 kg payload) and production details
C-NAVIGATOR product page was skipped; would confirm full specs for NDAA-compliant handheld GCS and any Blue UAS claims

tagline: Manufacturer of multi-fuel heavy-lift hexacopters (Carrier H6 Electric/Hybrid/Hydrone, up to 40 kg payload via H6HL) and coaxial octocopters (Hx8), paired with NDAA-compliant ground-control systems (C-NAVIGATOR, C-SRoC). Blue UAS status unknown. Domestic production claimed; public evidence thin on military adoption or fielded programs beyond compliance certifications.
